title: Mbox Archive
documentation:
## Purpose
Mbox is a family of file formats for storing a collection of email messages as a plain-text file, where each message is delimited by a `From ` separator line. The [Mbox Archive](https://capdag.com/browse/media:mbox;textable;list) media type represents any file following this convention.

## When to use
Use this type when a node exports or imports a batch of email messages as a single file — for example, mailbox backups, email dataset dumps, or migrations between mail servers. For single messages use the [Email Message](https://capdag.com/browse/media:eml;textable;record) type instead.

## Notes
There are several mbox variants (mboxo, mboxrd, mboxcl, mboxcl2) that differ in how they escape embedded `From ` lines. Implementers should use a library that handles the chosen variant's quoting rules rather than splitting on `From ` naively. The `;textable;list` tags indicate this is a human-readable ordered list of messages.
